{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = Elysia symbol
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The symbol of [[Elysia]] is a winged [[sword]], point-down, with a rising sun in the background.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c5">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
